name: Peanut Butter and Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 banana, sliced directly into the batter
3/4 cup Peanut butter, creamy or chunky
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the yeast and warm water. Let sit for 5 minutes until foamy.
2. Add the bread flour, wheat flour, gluten, brown sugar, and salt to the bowl with the yeast mixture.
3. Mash the banana in a separate bowl and mix it with the egg.
4. Pour the banana-egg mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
5. Stir in the peanut butter.
6. Grease a loaf pan with non-stick spray or brush with melted butter.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Cover the pan with foil or a lid.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
